case_title: JESSE TURNER VS. MUNI (SMTA) AN AGENCY OF CITY COUNTY SF

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TURNER, JESSE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MUNI (SMTA)  AN AGENCY OF CITY COUNTY SF
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TURNER, JESSE AS TO DEFENDANT MUNI (SMTA)  AN AGENCY OF CITY COUNTY SF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE RE:INABILITY TO ATTEND NOV-30-2015 COURT HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF TURNER, JESSE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-30-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY INA MUNDINE--FINANCE. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-31-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "CONTINUED DATE GIVEN PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S LETTER FILED WITH THE COURT ON 11/24/15", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-31-2016. NO APPEARANCES AND NO PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEMPORE SAM LAW. CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
